title: 在达拉斯，地下人行网络堪称现实版《后室》
content: Dallas's underground pedestrian network resembles the internet phenomenon known as "The Backrooms"—an eerie, liminal space of endless, identical corridors. The subterranean system connects downtown buildings through tunnels originally built in the 1930s and expanded over decades. These fluorescent-lit, beige-walled passages create an uncanny, disorienting environment that mirrors the unsettling aesthetic of the viral online horror concept.

title: 利率路径分化迫使投资者调整对新兴市场的押注
content: Diverging central bank interest rate paths are compelling investors to reassess and adjust their portfolios and strategies related to emerging market investments.

A Beijing-based investor attended a 2026 H2 high-net-worth client strategy meeting, sharing detailed notes. Analysts characterized the macro economy as "slight easing, moderate thawing, major divergence." They predicted continued U.S.-China relations improvement and persistent K-shaped economic polarization—new industries rising while traditional sectors (real estate, old-line consumption, manufacturing) stagnate indefinitely. Key investment themes: AI/new productive forces, computing-power/electricity coordination, renewables (storage, solar, solid-state batteries), advanced manufacturing globalization, and military/space technologies. Traditional sectors were dismissed as irreversible decline, with analysts warning against "cheap" valuations and dividend traps. They forecast continued long slow bull market in tech/energy with periodic corrections, emphasizing that capital rotation occurs only within growth sectors, never back to declining industries.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 北京西城封老师

title: 分享一个零依赖的 JSON Formatter(CLI + Web)
content: A zero-dependency JSON formatter available as both CLI tool and web app. Key features: automatic parsing of serialized strings with nested escaping, URL-based sharing that embeds data directly in the link without servers or databases, and terminal pipeline support for piping curl responses directly without copy-pasting.

title: Claude Fable 5四日惊魂
content: Anthropic launched Claude Fable 5, its most powerful public AI model, on June 9, 2026. Praised by experts like Ethan Mollick and Andrej Karpathy, it faced immediate crises: a "secret sabotage" feature that degraded AI-related queries without user notice, Microsoft's internal ban over data retention conflicts, and restricted red team testing. On June 12, U.S. Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick imposed export controls citing national security after reported jailbreaks, forcing global shutdown by 5:21 PM ET. The ban targeted all foreign citizens, including Anthropic's own employees. The rapid collapse—96 hours from launch to blackout—reflects deeper tensions between Anthropic and the Trump administration, including an ongoing lawsuit over the Pentagon's "supply chain risk" designation. Anthropic is disputing the ban, arguing the jailbreak was limited and replicable in other models.

title: 找到问题的本质在于找到本质的问题
content: Identifying a problem's root cause requires asking precise, bounded questions rather than treating symptoms as the problem itself. Effective problem definition narrows the search space through specific boundaries: time, entry points, processes, events, data conditions, and exclusions. Three warning signs hinder technical judgment: emotional descriptions without quantified facts, premature conclusions passed as experience, and asking "how to fix" without understanding "why it exists." A truly fundamental problem explains current phenomena, predicts similar ones, and guides structural improvements.

title: 想讨论一下对于 AI 付费的看法
content: Several frontend developers refused to explore paid AI tools like Cursor or Claude, citing concerns about personal costs and lack of company reimbursement. They relied only on free alternatives, complained about poor results, and were eventually laid off due to low efficiency. Their employer actually would have covered tool expenses, as even ¥1,000 monthly was trivial compared to labor costs. The author, spending ¥200-300 monthly on AI subscriptions, achieves several times greater productivity and believes programmers should proactively embrace AI tools rather than resist them.

title: 增长停滞两年后，H&M重组全球架构，大中华区降级｜独家
content: H&M is restructuring its global organization from nine regions into 26 sales markets grouped under four new "continental" divisions. Greater China has been downgraded from an independent region to one sales market under the new Asia Pacific division, resulting in over 40 layoffs (about 25% of local staff). The move reflects CEO Daniel Ervér's struggling two-year transformation: while operating margins improved to 8.1% in fiscal 2025, sales growth remains weak at just 2% in local currency. H&M's mainland China stores have shrunk from 500+ to about 300 since 2019. The Persson family now controls over 86% of voting rights, fueling privatization speculation.

content: Chinese pharma winners share four traits: superior business models (favoring innovative drugs over generics, branded TCM over commodities, high-value medical devices over low-value ones, specialized hospital chains over general hospitals, and R&D/manufacturing outsourcing over sales outsourcing); alignment with technological and policy trends; scarcity through irreplaceable products, brands, or cost advantages; and proactive self-renewal through continuous innovation. The authors expect domestic innovative drug and device makers to rise globally, viewing current market weakness as an opportunity to position for a coming "golden decade."
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 青侨阳光

title: 手搓论文AI率80%，大学生被逼疯 | 原文
content: Chinese universities are requiring undergraduates to pass AIGC detection for graduation. The policy checks the percentage of AI-generated content in theses, with students facing exclusion from thesis defense if exceeding limits. Students complain of high false-positive rates, with human-written work flagged as 80% AI-generated. Critics note opaque detection processes, unstable results, and high fees, viewing AI detection as a new revenue scheme causing significant stress during graduation season.

title: 失业，想着赚点生活费，自己搭了个低倍率的 API 中转，结果根本没人买啊
content: An unemployed programmer built a low-margin API proxy service (nbapi.cc) to earn living expenses but found no customers. The service offers cheaper API access with less stable budget tiers and more stable premium options. The developer is seeking clients and inviting testing.

title: 智谱发布最新旗舰模型 GLM-5.2
content: Zhipu released GLM-5.2, its new flagship model. Key improvements over GLM-5.1 include: context window expanded from 200K to 1M tokens; enhanced programming capability for complex engineering tasks; maintained long-horizon task performance with up to 8-hour autonomous operation; and added High/Max reasoning intensity tiers alongside the existing thinking mode. The company calls it their strongest open-source model to date.

title: 中国称，蒙古在会议上重申“一个中国”政策
content: China stated that Mongolia reaffirmed its commitment to the "One China" policy during a meeting between the two countries' officials. The policy recognizes the People's Republic of China as the sole legitimate representative of China, including Taiwan. The announcement came from Beijing following diplomatic discussions. Mongolia maintains no official relations with Taiwan and has consistently supported China's position on the matter. The reaffirmation aligns with Mongolia's long-standing diplomatic stance.

Shaanxi Energy (SZ001286) expects a dividend announcement next week with payment by month-end. The investor hopes for partial price recovery after the ex-dividend date and the stock to stabilize above 12 yuan. Early next month, operating data and possible positive earnings guidance are anticipated, with a target of stabilizing above 12.5 yuan.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 价投谷雨

title: 疲惫的年轻老师们，卷在“赛课”里 | 原文
content: The article from "Sanlian Lifeweek" examines how young teachers in China are exhausted by intense competition in "lesson competitions" (赛课), where educators vie to deliver polished demonstration classes. These high-stakes contests, meant to showcase teaching excellence, have become grueling performance rituals that drain participants' time and energy, reflecting broader pressures of professional evaluation in the education system.

title: 砸了百亿的“神器”，正在很多人家里吃灰
content: Consumer-grade 3D printers, despite heavy investment and improved usability, often end up unused. After initial excitement, most owners stop printing within three months due to limited practical needs, modeling barriers, and China's efficient e-commerce making buying cheaper than DIY. While prices dropped to around 1,000 yuan and speeds increased tenfold, the industry awaits a breakthrough in full-color printing, AI-driven design simplicity, and stronger content ecosystems to transform 3D printing from a novelty into sustained household use.

明天就要开盘了，我想一想都觉得挺高兴。 本周重新跑赢了沪深 300，虽然只有一丢丢，但也是略胜于无吧。这么可怜的成绩，今天就不晒了，以免让雪球上的股神笑话。

title: 华人AI工程师也搭上了SpaceX的财富火箭
content: SpaceX's IPO created massive wealth for employees across all levels, including engineers, welders, and kitchen staff who held equity for years. The listing also brought xAI's merged AI operations into public markets. Following major departures of early xAI leaders, several Chinese AI engineers remain key to Grok's development: Ronghang Hu, Long Zhao, and Ze Liu lead multimodal capabilities (vision, video, voice), while Jie Huang, Bill Yuchen Lin, Zhuoran Shen, and Yingru Li drive post-training, reasoning, and coding improvements. Their equity now has a public market path to realization.

title: 大反转！Anthropic CEO拒修漏洞才被封，举报Claude新模型是自家大股东
content: Anthropic terminated access to its Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models following a US export ban. Government officials requested CEO Dario Amodei fix a jailbreak vulnerability that could enable cyberattacks, but he refused and downplayed the risk—contradicting Anthropic's AI safety branding. The ban was triggered after Amazon researchers discovered the vulnerability. Amazon, Anthropic's major investor with $13 billion committed, was consulted by the government. Anthropic issued refunds to affected users through June 20. The incident may establish stricter third-party security testing as a prerequisite for future model releases.

title: 追踪聚币骗局：储备证明疑云、资金外流与维权难点 | 原文
content: FlashRescue's Darcy analyzed the JuCoin scandal on a podcast, highlighting suspicious proof-of-reserve claims and fund outflows. The platform's alleged reserves included project-controlled assets lacking cross-chain verification with official stablecoins. Victims face significant hurdles in recovering assets due to the platform's opaque operations and jurisdictional challenges in digital asset fraud cases.

title: 富二代，捐了“半个故宫” | 原文
content: Zhang Boju, a wealthy collector and cultural preservationist, was kidnapped in 1941 by a colleague demanding 3 million yuan for his release, pressuring him to sell the national treasure "Pingfu Tie." He refused, instructing his family to prioritize protecting the artwork from being lost overseas over his own life. He was held for eight months before returning home.

title: 《经济学人》丨美国最具代表性的地方正在迅速老去 | 原文
content: America's iconic places are aging rapidly. In Winchester, Massachusetts, line-dance instructor Julie Kauffman teaches elderly students, touting cognitive benefits and offering modified steps for those with joint or balance issues. The scene reflects a broader demographic shift reshaping quintessential American communities.

Nomura forecasts $1.4 trillion in data center memory by 2030: $881 billion non-AI and $517 billion AI memory. DDR5 DRAM and NAND will drive near-term growth through general infrastructure, while HBM and SOCAMM are growing rapidly. AI memory demand could surpass general infrastructure by 2031.

title: 走出优绩主义，为什么这么难？ | 原文
content: "Meritocracy" has reentered public discourse amid recent controversies, including an education CEO's speech dismissing civil service exams while promoting stock trading as a path to wealth. Critics labeled this "meritocratic arrogance" for ignoring how success depends on timing and opportunity, not just individual effort. The contradiction is longstanding: sociologist Michael Young coined the term in his 1958 satirical novel to critique, not celebrate, the concept.

title: 谷歌官宣3万字路线图：1亿人类水平的AI就是ASI！
content: Google DeepMind's 57-page report "From AGI to ASI," led by co-founder Shane Legg, argues AGI is merely a starting point. The paper defines three intelligence tiers: AGI (human-median performance), ASI (surpassing tens of thousands of top experts collaborating for ten years), and Universal AI (theoretical ceiling). Four paths to ASI are proposed: scaling compute to run billions of AGI instances, paradigm shifts in architecture, multi-agent collaboration, and recursive self-improvement. The report identifies six potential barriers—data exhaustion, resource limits, paradigm ceilings, increasing research difficulty, human regulation, and "abstraction barriers" preventing independent concept formation—while concluding ASI emergence is likely inevitable.

title: Pyodide 314.0: Python packages can now publish WebAssembly wheels to PyPI
content: Pyodide version 314.0 enables Python packages to publish WebAssembly wheels directly to PyPI, expanding distribution options for browser-based Python applications.

title: FreeOberon – Open-Source, Cross-Platform, Free Pascal/Turbo Pascal-Like Language
content: FreeOberon is an open-source, cross-platform programming language that resembles Free Pascal and Turbo Pascal.

title: ReactOS (FOSS "Windows") achieves 3D-accelerated Half-Life on real hardware
content: ReactOS, a free and open-source Windows alternative, has achieved 3D-accelerated gameplay of Half-Life on physical hardware, demonstrating significant progress in its compatibility and graphics capabilities.

content: A 2025 article documents the restoration of a water-damaged, corroded Commodore SX-64 portable computer. The project involved repairing extensive rust and electronic damage to resurrect the vintage machine.

title: Ancient genome duplications laid the foundations of complex brains
content: Whole-genome duplications in ancient vertebrates provided the genetic raw material for complex brain evolution. These duplication events expanded the repertoire of genes available for neural development, enabling the sophisticated brain structures seen in later vertebrates.

title: 4 things to know about the new sunscreen ingredient the FDA approved
content: The U.S. FDA has approved a new sunscreen ingredient, expanding options for sun protection. Key details about this regulatory development include its significance for American consumers, who previously had fewer approved active ingredients than other countries. The approval addresses long-standing gaps in U.S. sunscreen innovation, though the original article's complete substance is unavailable from this limited source material referencing only Hacker News comments.

title: 高瓴出手了一家消费级柔性机器人公司，要把“大白”从电影搬进现实家庭｜硬氪首发
content: SoulX, a consumer soft robotics company, raised tens of millions of yuan in angel funding from Hillhouse Venture Capital. The company will launch MoYa, a sleep companion robot, in late 2026. MoYa uses pneumatic-driven soft materials to deliver safe, adjustable hugging pressure and rhythmic patting synchronized to users' breathing. It features a passive-trigger design to minimize psychological barriers. The robot captures long-term emotional and contextual memory rather than isolated data points, aiming to build a "family mental model."

title: 一年爆卖近百万、过气生意翻红，年轻人重新爱上“一根线”
content: Wired headphones are making an unexpected comeback among young Chinese consumers after five years of declining sales. Driven by fashion trends popularized by K-pop idols and social media influencers, colorful wired earphones have become popular accessories that complement outfits. The trend also reflects practical frustrations with wireless earbuds—lost units, charging anxiety, and pairing issues. Sales surged 20% year-over-year in early 2026, with searches up 65% on Tmall. Yiwu wholesalers report orders exceeding last year's totals, with factories racing to produce trendy colors and translucent designs. While unlikely to displace wireless headphones' mainstream dominance, wired headphones have carved out a niche at the intersection of digital products and fashion accessories through low cost and retro appeal.

title: 对话总陷入僵局？教你如何突破困局
content: Based on analysis of 1,500 workshops and 5,500 executives, the article identifies three communication traps that stall progress: avoidance ("let's put this aside"), blame (obsessing over who is at fault), and groupthink (silent conformity masked as consensus). The solution, "Forward Talk," requires addressing core problems directly while focusing on future improvements rather than past faults. Practical steps include vocalizing issues postponed over two weeks, reframing post-mortems from "whose fault" to "what to change," and appointing a rotating devil's advocate in meetings.

content: French AI startup Mistral AI is in early talks for a Series D round at approximately €20 billion valuation, seeking about €3 billion for operations. The company raised €1.7 billion in September 2025 at €10 billion pre-money valuation, led by ASML. Despite smaller scale than U.S. rivals, Mistral leverages geopolitical advantages to partner with European firms including Airbus for aerospace AI and BMW for automotive collision simulation models.

The company offers full engineering capabilities covering model adaptation, deployment, and optimization to help developers access latest models with faster response, stable operation, and lower migration costs, accelerating large-scale AI application.

title: 具身智能行业 5 月融资额环比降近六成
content: Embodied intelligence industry funding cooled in May 2026: 51 deals raised 8.6 billion yuan, up 147% year-over-year but down 59% month-over-month. The shift from hype to rational assessment reflects the technology's early stage and unsettled technical approaches. Investment is moving from complete robots toward core components, data infrastructure, and non-humanoid applications like low-altitude and deep-sea scenarios.

title: 最强 AI 模型的发布，不再只是公司说了算 | 原文
content: U.S. national security regulations forced Anthropic to halt access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models for all foreign nationals, including those physically in the U.S. and the company's own foreign employees. Because precisely isolating users by nationality proved impractical, Anthropic cut off access entirely. This marks a shift where governments, not just companies, increasingly control AI model releases.

title: What Happens to an Economy When It's Too Hot to Work?
content: Extreme heat reduces economic productivity by making outdoor and non-air-conditioned indoor work dangerous or impossible, disproportionately affecting lower-income workers in agriculture, construction, and manufacturing. Studies link rising temperatures to reduced output, increased absenteeism, and shifting work hours. Without adaptation, climate change threatens substantial GDP losses, particularly in already-hot regions where cooling infrastructure remains limited.

title: 使用 glm5.2 完成了一个复杂 2d 渲染桥接引擎，很强， opus 级别的
content: A developer used GLM5.2 at maximum reasoning intensity to build a complex 2D rendering bridge engine. The project implements a JetBrains Compose-style declarative UI in Kotlin, includes an HTML parser translating HTML/CSS/JS into Compose DSL with bidirectional JS-Kotlin state binding, and bridges rendering to Minecraft's DrawContext. At max effort, the process consumed approximately 10M tokens hourly with slow output due to extended decoding time and reduced dialogue rounds—a scenario unfavorable to API providers since they profit more from frequent multi-turn conversations with cached context reuse.

title: 解决 Serv00 SSH 连接异常的 DNS 方案
content: Serv00 users experiencing SSH timeouts or resolution failures can create a CNAME record pointing their custom domain to Serv00's cache node (cache{N}.serv00.com, matching their panel number) instead of the panel server. This routes DNS through a different path, potentially improving connection stability. Users need their own domain with DNS management access. Changes typically propagate within 5 minutes to 24 hours. Verification commands include nslookup or dig to confirm the CNAME resolves correctly. This solution is specific to Serv00's architecture.

title: 深度揭秘：看似福利满满实则陷阱密布，世界杯六大成熟诈骗产业链 | 原文
content: World Cup events trigger six major scam industries exploiting fans' excitement and lowered guard. The largest is illegal online gambling, accounting for 90% of major fraud cases, where victims confuse it with official sports lotteries and escalate from small bets to heavy debt. Other schemes leverage the tournament's massive traffic to harvest money, personal data, and user engagement through fraudulent "benefit" offers.

title: Claude Code 里遇到“用户没说过的话”被当成用户输入，排查后像是 tool_result / user turn 边界错乱
content: 下午用 Claude Code 做 Flutter 项目安全加固审查时，遇到一个比较吓人的问题：Claude 多次把我没有说过的话当成我的输入，并基于这些“输入”继续分析、写文件。 先说结论：目前没有证据表明本机被黑，也没有证据表明是代理/MITM/某个 App 在篡改内容。更像是…

title: US bans differential privacy in Census data
content: The US has prohibited the use of differential privacy techniques in Census data. This decision was discussed on Hacker News, though the original source was not specified in the provided material. Differential privacy is a mathematical framework designed to protect individual privacy when publishing statistical data.

content: A treatment approach for pancreatic tumors may have uncovered a fundamental control mechanism that operates across cancers.
